location.description: The location for the Namespace. A full list of valid locations can be found by running `gcloud beta service-directory locations list`.

namespace_id.description: The Resource ID must be 1-63 characters long, including digits, lowercase letters or the hyphen character.

labels.description: Resource labels associated with this Namespace. No more than 64 user labels can be associated with a given resource. Label keys and values can be no longer than 63 characters. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
